episodes.title: Waco American Apocalypse Episode 3: Fire
episodes.description:
In Waco, Texas in 1993, cult leader David Koresh faces off against the federal government in a 51-day siege that begins with the biggest gunfight on American soil since the Civil War and ends with a fiery inferno captured live on national television.

episodes.title: Sean Combs: The Reckoning
episodes.description:
On December 7, 2023, executive producer Curtis Jackson, aka 50 Cent, announced that he was developing a Sean Combs docuseries and that proceeds from the project would go to victims of the sexual misconduct allegations against Combs. Before hiring Alexandra Stapleton to direct the series, Jackson had been working on the project for five months, looking for people close to Combs who were willing to "speak and tell the truth". Cassie Ventura, Combs's former partner, was invited to participate in the series, but declined. However, Jackson stated that he personally spoke with Ventura and her husband, Alex Fine, "to understand how things transpired" with Combs. Netflix announced production of the series on September 25, 2024, one week after Combs was arrested on charges of racketeering, sex trafficking, and transportation to engage in prostitution. Jackson and Stapleton said: This is a story with significant human impact. It is a complex narrative spanning decades, not just the headlines or clips seen so far. We remain steadfast in our commitment to give a voice to the voiceless and to present authentic and nuanced perspectives. While the allegations are disturbing, we urge all to remember that Sean Combs' story is not the full story of hip-hop and its culture. We aim to ensure that individual actions do not overshadow the culture's broader contributions. The series features clips of Combs in the days before his 2024 arrest, prompting questions over how Jackson and Netflix acquired the personal footage. Stapleton stated, "It came to us, we obtained the footage legally and have the necessary rights."

episodes.title: The Stanford Prison Experiment: Unlocking The Truth
episodes.description:
This 2024 docuseries takes a closer look at the Stanford Prison Experiment, one of the most famous psychology studies in modern history. Many of the study's participants are now speaking about their experiences for the first time and reveal that the experiment was severely flawed.

episodes.title: Escaping Evil - My Life In A Cult
episodes.description:
In this episode we discuss 2 episodes of the Hulu docuseries "Escaping Evil - My Life In A Cult". The series profiles survivors of some of the world's most well known cults including Jim Jones' People's Temple; The Family International, formerly known as Children of God; and the FLDS - the Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints. These survivors give first hand accounts of how they were able to escape from these cults alive. We also talk generally about cults, what kind of people start them and what kind of people join them.

episodes.title: Dancing for the Devil: The 7M Tik Tok Cult
episodes.description:
This documentary follows a group of young adult dancers and social media influencers with large TikTok and Instagram followings who unwittingly become part of a cult led by Robert Shinn. This cult extended to Shinn's church, Shekinah Church, in Los Angeles, California. Concerned parents race against time to uncover the truth behind the 7M Cult and rescue their children before it's too late. Sisters Melanie and Priscylla Lee, who were effectively orphaned as children and taken in by Shekinah, only to be abused for decades, are also featured. They file a lawsuit against Shinn and Shekinah for damages for theirs and others' years of abuse.

episodes.title: Daughters of the Cult
episodes.description: In this episode we discuss the Hulu documentary Daughters of the Cult about the LeBaron family who ran a polygamist cult in the U.S. and Mexico for decades. The docuseries is primarily narrated by two daughters of Ervil LeBaron, the founder of the cult. He was called the Mormon Manson because he carried out at least 30 serial killer type murders by using his followers to do the actual killing, which continued even after his death. The narrators were able to escape the cult and live to tell about it, many others were not so lucky.
subjects: Church of the First Born of the Lamb of God

episodes.title: Love Has Won: The Cult of Mother God
episodes.description: This three part docuseries chronicles the life and death of Amy Carlson, also known as Mother God, a self-proclaimed spiritual savior who built a cult. Carlson and her followers believed she was God, a 19 billion year old being and a reincarnation of Jesus Christ. Calrson's body was found mummified in the compound of the group in April of 2021 in Crestone, Colorado. Her cause of death was found to be from chronic alcohol abuse, chronic anorexia, organ failure and colloidal silver ingestion. Please SUBSCRIBE to the podcast and give us a 5-star rating and review.
